impact.label: IMPACT AREAS
impact.title: Solutions with real impact on your organization.

operations.desc: Automation of critical tasks and workflow optimization to reduce operational costs.

talent.desc: AI tools to multiply your team's productivity and facilitate change management.

services.heroTitle: 15 years optimizing processes, now powered by AI.
services.heroDesc: Our story doesn't start with the rise of generative AI; we've spent a decade eliminating operational friction in large organizations. AI is the engine we've integrated to make your company smarter and more profitable.
services.reinforcement: Our expertise is born from operational efficiency and evolves toward strategic intelligence.
services.philosophyLabel: TECHNOLOGY AT THE SERVICE OF PEOPLE
services.philosophyP1: We don't replace people, we empower their talent. We create Augmented Intelligence by combining human judgment with technological power.
services.philosophyP2: The result is Augmented Teams and multiplied results. Fewer manual tasks, more strategic impact. It's that simple.
services.clientsTitle: Companies already simplifying their future with us.
services.ctaDesc: The risk isn't implementing AI—it's falling behind while your competition does.

about.heroDesc: We transform technological uncertainty into a measurable and structured competitive advantage. No complications. Making AI easy.

about.diagnosisDesc: 85% of AI projects fail due to lack of methodology. We design the structure that guarantees real impact on your bottom line.

01.stat:
BOSTON CONSULTING GROUP
THE WIDENING AI VALUE GAP, 2025
01.desc: 78% use GenAI, but only 5% extract substantial value.

02.title: The EBIT Gap
02.desc: 80% of companies see no EBIT impact after 12 months.

03.title: Shadow AI
03.stat:
KPMG & UNIVERSITY OF MELBOURNE
TRUST, ATTITUDES AND USE OF AI, 2025
03.desc: 78% of employees use 'informal' AI. 57% hide it, risking corporate data.

04.title: Governance Arrives 'Late'
04.stat:
DELOITTE
THE STATE OF GENERATIVE AI IN ENTERPRISE, 2024
04.desc: Only 15% feel prepared for risks. They accelerate without guardrails or freeze out of fear.

05.title: "Eternal pilots" that go nowhere
05.stat:
MCKINSEY
THE STATE OF AI: HOW ORGANIZATIONS ARE REWRITING, 2025
05.desc: 80-85% of pilots never reach production. Only 10% report using agents in any function.

06.title: Invisible Resistance
06.stat:
KPMG & UNIVERSITY OF MELBOURNE
TRUST, ATTITUDES AND USE OF AI, 2025
06.desc: Fear of job loss and generic training that doesn't change habits.

about.sprintDesc: Six pillars that transform uncertainty into a productive and measurable AI operating system.

S.title: Squads
S.desc: Specialized teams (squads) to ground real day-to-day use cases. No generic demos.

P.title: Priorities
P.desc: The business decides and prioritizes what to change first. Always in the driver's seat. With the AI Office active from minute one.

R.title: Roadmap
R.desc: Clear roadmap and 'fast tracks' or short periods to replicate what works.

I.title: Impact
I.desc: Balance between training, consulting and automation for efficient processes.

N.title: Numbers
N.desc: Measurable objectives and ROI (OPEX and CAPEX). Total clarity and objectivity.

T.title: Trust
T.desc: Governance, ethics and security from the start to ensure information integrity.

work.desc2: Our obsession is achieving measurable results by automating repetitive tasks. We transform technical complexity into scalable operating models. From vision to real production.
